title: Kerala High Court orders removal of Vellappally Natesan as SNDP General Secretary
description: The Kerala High Court on Thursday ordered removal of SNDP Yogam General Secretary Vellappally Natesan from his post after finding that the organisation failed to submits its financial statements within the stipulated time as per law [Prof MK Sanoo v State of Kerala & ors and connected cases].Justice TR Ravi observed that the failure to file audited accounts for three consecutive years attracted disqualification of the directors of the Aruvippuram Sree Narayana Dharma Paripalana Yogam (SNDP Y
